description: 二战前欧洲(1938), 1938Q1 to 1950Q2, 28 countries, 50 rounds. Each round=3 months. Following is issue-specific leadership preference (NOT alliance).
following_definition: 追随!=同盟: 追随是对某国在特定议题上的领导偏好, 不等同于战略同盟关系。盟友可能在经济议题上追随敌对阵营的领导者, 这是正常的外交现象。每轮的追随基于该轮最突出议题上的政策协调对象。

key_issue_specific_cases.Italy(5): Axis member with Germany(2), but on colonial/Mediterranean issues follows independent path. Post-1943 armistice follows UK(3).
key_issue_specific_cases.Yugoslavia(12): Communist state, initially follows USSR(1), breaks with Stalin in 1948 (R35) and becomes independent.
key_issue_specific_cases.Finland(20): Winter War seeks UK(3) support, post-1944 forced to follow USSR(1) on security, maintains Western economic ties.
key_issue_specific_cases.Spain(7): Franco regime remains independent (non-aligned) throughout, not following any great power.
key_issue_specific_cases.Romania(10): Pre-war follows UK(3)/France(4), joins Axis in 1940, switches to USSR(1) in 1944.
key_issue_specific_cases.Ireland(26): Neutral throughout WWII and early Cold War, independent of all great powers.

1.dominant_issue: Pre-Anschluss tensions - Germany pressures Austria, UK/France appeasement posture

2.dominant_issue: Anschluss - Germany annexes Austria, Sudeten crisis begins, appeasement continues

3.dominant_issue: Sudeten Crisis peaks - Germany demands Sudetenland, Europe on brink of war, UK mediates

4.dominant_issue: Munich Agreement - UK/France sacrifice Czechoslovakia to Germany, appeasement peak

5.dominant_issue: Germany occupies Prague - appeasement ends, UK/France guarantee Poland and Romania

6.dominant_issue: Anglo-Polish alliance & Nazi-Soviet negotiations - Europe polarizes

7.dominant_issue: WWII begins - Germany invades Poland, UK/France declare war, USSR occupies eastern Poland

8.dominant_issue: Poland falls & Winter War begins - Finland resists USSR, Phoney War in the West

9.dominant_issue: Winter War ends - Finland cedes territory to USSR, Phoney War in West continues

10.dominant_issue: Germany blitzkrieg through Western Europe - Denmark/Norway/Belgium/Netherlands fall

11.dominant_issue: France surrenders & Battle of Britain - Vichy France, Italy joins war on German side, UK stands alone

12.dominant_issue: Axis expands - Hungary/Romania/Bulgaria join Axis, Greece resists Italian invasion

13.dominant_issue: Yugoslav coup against Axis & Lend-Lease begins - UK gains ally, US supports UK materially

14.dominant_issue: Germany invades Yugoslavia & Greece - Balkans fall to Axis, Crete airborne invasion

15.dominant_issue: Barbarossa begins - Germany invades USSR, USSR joins Allies, Eastern Front opens

16.dominant_issue: Battle of Moscow & Pearl Harbor - USSR holds at Moscow, US enters war, global coalition forms

17.dominant_issue: Total war - Stalingrad, El Alamein, Midway; Axis at peak, Allies build offensive capacity

18.dominant_issue: Stalingrad turning point - German 6th Army encircled, Allies land in North Africa

19.dominant_issue: Stalingrad surrender & Kursk preparation - Axis strategic initiative lost

20.dominant_issue: Battle of Kursk & Allied invasion of Sicily - last German Eastern offensive fails

21.dominant_issue: Italy surrenders & Allied invasion of Italy - Italian armistice, German occupation of northern Italy

22.dominant_issue: Leningrad liberated & Italian campaign - USSR advances, Allies stuck at Monte Cassino

23.dominant_issue: D-Day & Operation Bagration - Allies land in Normandy, USSR destroys Army Group Centre

24.dominant_issue: Romania switches sides & Warsaw Uprising - Eastern Europe in flux, Allies liberate France and Belgium

25.dominant_issue: Battle of the Bulge & Soviet advance into Hungary - Germany's last Western offensive fails

26.dominant_issue: Yalta Conference & race to Berlin - postwar order planned, Allied offensive in West and East

27.dominant_issue: Germany surrenders - VE Day, postwar occupation zones, Potsdam Conference preparation

28.dominant_issue: Potsdam Conference & end of WWII - atomic bombs, Japan surrenders, Cold War seeds planted

29.dominant_issue: Postwar order crystallizes - Soviet sphere in Eastern Europe, UK leads Western Europe

30.dominant_issue: Churchill's Iron Curtain speech & Greek Civil War begins - Cold War rhetoric escalates

31.dominant_issue: Paris Peace Treaties & Turkey crisis - USSR demands Turkish Straits, West resists

32.dominant_issue: Cold War polarization accelerates - Bulgaria becomes People's Republic, West consolidates

33.dominant_issue: Truman Doctrine & Marshall Plan - US/UK lead Western economic recovery, USSR rejects, Cold War institutionalized

34.dominant_issue: Czechoslovak coup - Communists take power in Czechoslovakia, West alarmed

35.dominant_issue: Tito-Stalin split - Yugoslavia breaks from Soviet bloc, asserts independent communist path

36.dominant_issue: Berlin Blockade begins - USSR blocks West Berlin, Allies organize airlift

37.dominant_issue: Berlin Airlift ongoing & NATO negotiations - Western allies demonstrate resolve

38.dominant_issue: NATO founded - Western collective defense alliance established

39.dominant_issue: Berlin Blockade ends & Soviet atomic bomb - USSR tests A-bomb, Cold War arms race begins

40.dominant_issue: Two German states founded - FRG (West Germany) and GDR (East Germany) established

41.dominant_issue: Korean War begins - North Korea invades South, Cold War turns hot in Asia, West unites behind US/UK

42.dominant_issue: Korean War - Inchon landing, UN forces advance north, China intervention looms

43.dominant_issue: China enters Korean War - UN forces retreat, Cold War tensions peak

44.dominant_issue: Korean War stalemate - front stabilizes near 38th parallel, armistice talks begin

45.dominant_issue: Korean War armistice talks & European integration - Schuman Plan, ECSC formed

46.dominant_issue: Stalin's final years - Cold War at peak tension, McCarthyism in US

47.dominant_issue: Stalin dies - USSR leadership transition, Malenkov becomes Premier, Cold War thaw begins

48.dominant_issue: East German uprising & Korean armistice - Soviet bloc unrest, Korean War ends

49.dominant_issue: Geneva Conference - Korea and Indochina settlements, Cold War detente begins

50.dominant_issue: Paris Agreements & Western European Union - West Germany rearmed within NATO framework
